verses.2: Allatheena itha iktaloo AAala alnnasi yastawfoona
verses.7: Kalla inna kitaba alfujjari lafee sijjeenin
verses.12: Wama yukaththibu bihi illa kullu muAAtadin atheemin
verses.13: Itha tutla AAalayhi ayatuna qala asateeru alawwaleena
verses.14: Kalla bal rana AAala quloobihim ma kanoo yaksiboona
verses.15: Kalla innahum AAan rabbihim yawmaithin lamahjooboona
verses.17: Thumma yuqalu hatha allathee kuntum bihi tukaththiboona
verses.18: Kalla inna kitaba alabrari lafee AAilliyyeena
verses.26: Khitamuhu miskun wafee thalika falyatanafasi almutanafisoona
verses.29: Inna allatheena ajramoo kanoo mina allatheena amanoo yadhakoona
verses.31: Waitha inqalaboo ila ahlihimu inqalaboo fakiheena
verses.32: Waitha raawhum qaloo inna haolai ladalloona
verses.34: Faalyawma allatheena amanoo mina alkuffari yadhakoona
verses.36: Hal thuwwiba alkuffaru ma kanoo yafAAaloona
